briefdescription.para: Number of the component to handle.

detaileddescription.para: In IJK we need to store the initial name of the requested field because of the switch done on some fields (see Champs_compris_IJK::switch_ft_fields()). This switch might rename the field, but we want this to stay constant for a probe!

briefdescription.para: Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

detaileddescription.para: Creation des Champ_Generique_refChamp necessaire pour l initialisation de la REF a Champ_Generique_base Si le champ demande est un Champ_base connu du probleme on cree le Champ_Generique_refChamp correspondant
Fill the array 'valeurs_locales' used by each proc to store prob local values

Fix probe position. In IJK, if no position modifier is specified, we systematically move the probe to the center of the element for a ELEM field, and to the face corresponding to the field component if this is a FACE field.
In IJK, velocity components might be interpolated/moved to element center. This is equivalent to having a ELEM field.
Retrieve the domain to be used for the probe
Retrieve the number of component for the field - overriden in IJK
Retrieve the field names - overriden in IJK
Retrieve the current time for the field - overriden in IJK

briefdescription.para: Imprime le type de l'objet sur un flot de sortie.
Lit les specifications d'une sonde a partir d'un flot d'entree.

detaileddescription.para: Format: Sondes { [nom_sonde nom_champ Periode dts Points n x1 y1 [z1] ... xn yn [zn] [nom_sonde nom_champ Periode dts Segment ns x1 y1 [z1] x2 y2 [z2] ... }

parameterdescription.para: de la sonde pas definies correctement

detaileddescription.para: Update the underlying field source if needed
Override. Exit if invalid localisation for the probe.
Override. Exit if invalid type for the probe.
